name: One Dish Chicken & Stuffing Bake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Pepperidge Farm Herb Seasoned Stuffing
4 to 6, skinless boneless chicken breast halves
1 can (10 3/4 oz) cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix stuffing with 1 1/4 cups boiling water and 1 1/4 tablespoons margarine.
2. Spoon the stuffing mixture across the center of a 3-quart shallow baking dish.
3. Place chicken on each side of the stuffing in the baking dish.
4. Sprinkle paprika over the chicken.
5. Mix together the soup, milk, and parsley.
6. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
7. Bake covered at 400°F for 30 minutes or until the chicken is no longer pink.
YIELD: 4 to 6 servings
